_comment: Fire Phoenix — Renegade Immortal. A reborn fire avian beast. Canon: appears in the Sea of Devils arc; its feathers are alchemy-grade materials.
name: Fire Phoenix

canonical.appearance: A large avian wreathed in crimson flame. Feathers glow like embers; wingspan of 3-5 meters. Reborn from its own ashes.
canonical.behavior: Territorial but not aggressive unless provoked. Nests near fire-aligned spirit veins. Rebirth cycle upon death (drops phoenix feather).
canonical.habitat: Planet Suzaku — volcanic biomes, fire spirit veins, the Sea of Devils outer regions
canonical.cultivation: Qi Condensation to Foundation Establishment equivalent
canonical.intelligence: 4-6 (high for a beast — capable of recognizing cultivators by realm)
canonical.diet: Spirit stones, fire-element herbs, raw spiritual energy from veins
canonical.relationships: Preyed upon by higher-realm cultivators for feathers. Sometimes kept as a guardian by fire-aligned sects.
mutations: Ash Rebirth — upon taking fatal damage, revives at 50% HP once per day
canonical.ecology: Apex fire-attribute predator in volcanic regions. Competes with Thunder Birds for territory near spirit veins.

art_direction.model_notes: Large bird with spread wings on fire. Particle emitter for ember trail.
art_direction.texture_notes: Crimson-orange plumage with glowing feather tips. Blackened beak and talons.
